sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_linestring (l LineString) ENGINE = Memory();
UPDATE geo_linestring SET l = [(1, 1), (2, 2), (3, 3)] WHERE l = [(0, 0), (5, 5), (10, 5)];
SELECT l, length(l) AS length FROM geo_linestring;
INSERT INTO geo_linestring VALUES([(0, 0), (10, 10), (20, 0)]) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE l = [(0, 0), (10, 10), (20, 0)];
